channel.title: Urban Climate Research Digest
channel.description: Urban Climate Research Podcast for Personal Use
channel.itunes:author: sy4232

item.title: 2026-06-16 のダイジェスト：A Methodological Framework for Blockchai ほか1本
item.description: 今回の論文： ・A Methodological Framework for Blockchain-Enabled Peer-to-Peer Solar Trading to Mitigate Urban Heat Islands: A Lagos, Togo Case Study (2021–2026) ・A Methodological Framework for Blockchain-Enabled Peer-to-Peer Solar Trading to Mitigate Urban Heat Islands: A Lagos, Togo Case Study (2021–2026)
